statement: AMD's Instinct line holds roughly 5-7% of the AI accelerator market in 2026, versus NVIDIA at approximately 80%.
why: AMD is establishing a minority but growing position in AI accelerators against NVIDIA's dominant share.

impact.mechanism: AMD capturing 5-7% share reflects incremental demand diversion from NVIDIA to AMD accelerators.

evidence.source: AMD Blogs - Instinct MI350 Series / Advancing AI (design wins)
evidence.excerpt: NVIDIA holds approximately 80% of the AI accelerator market in 2026, with AMD's Instinct GPU line capturing roughly 5-7% market share.

confidence.basis: secondary analyst figure quoted in AMD blog
